subcodes.first_line: The Book was revealed in truth, as the Ancient Beauty sat within the pavilion of grandeur upon the highest of mountain peaks [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق اذ کان جمال القدم جالسا فی خباء العظمه علی راس فی روس الجبال
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
